hero.description: Flexible strategic leadership to help organisations navigate complex technology landscapes and drive clear measurable outcomes.

about.title: Bringing together Engineering, Data, and AI
about.p1: A product-focused technology executive and people leader with a proven track record of scaling engineering and data teams across startup, midsize, and enterprise levels (Atlassian, Qantas, Prezzee).
about.p2: With the advent of AI. my experience puts in a unique position to drive technology strategy for modern organisations, enabling them to harness the power of data and automation to drive growth and innovation.
about.continuousLearnerDesc: that fits your timeline and budget.
about.coffeeEnthusiastDesc: delivering pragmatic solutions to complex problems.
about.whoIAmDesc1: My name is Vinny Lawrenson-Woods. I'm orginally from the UK I have over 25 years of experience in the UK, US and Australia. I help solve problems for organisations looking to scale or mature.
about.whoIAmDesc2: I can help build, implement, and drive your technical strategy and roadnmap across Engineering, Data and AI.

services.title: Advisory services designed to be actioned
services.description: (Re)engineered offers services tailored to meet the unique needs of your organisation.

contentStrategy.title: Technology Strategy
contentStrategy.description: Data-driven content plans aligned with your business goals to drive engagement, retention, and conversion across all channels.

businessConsulting.title: Operational Excellence
businessConsulting.description: Strategic advice to optimise your operations, identify new growth opportunities, and streamline your workflow.

brandDevelopment.title: Maturity Assessment
brandDevelopment.description: Benchmarking your Product Delivery, Engineering Excellence, Data Quality, and AI Readiness against industry best practices to identify areas for improvement and growth.

communityManagement.title: Team scaling and growth
communityManagement.description: Develop a strategy from recruitment to retention to ensure you can compete with industry leaders in your space.
features: Establishing your name in the Technology community

advisoryMentoring.title: Advisory & Mentoring
advisoryMentoring.description: Hands-on advisory and mentoring to accelerate leaders and teams through pragmatic guidance and measurable outcomes.

process.title: My Process
process.description: A simple, transparent approach to delivering results.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We start by understanding your business, goals, and audience.

strategy.title: Plan
strategy.description: I develop a tailored roadmap to achieve your objectives.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: We implement the strategy with precision and creativity.

optimisation.title: Optimisation
optimisation.description: We track results and refine the approach for maximum impact.

items.body: Working with this team was a game-changer for our business. The content strategy provided was clear, actionable, and delivered immediate results.
I highly recommend their services to anyone looking to elevate their brand. Professional, creative, and truly dedicated to client success.
The attention to detail and understanding of our niche was impressive. A fantastic partner for our growth journey.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or would you like to learn more about our services? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.infoDesc: Prefer to reach out directly? Here's how you can find us.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

footer.privacyContent: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. We only collect information necessary to provide our services and improve your experience. We do not sell your data to third parties. Any data submitted via the contact form is stored securely and used only for communication purposes.
footer.termsContent: By using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use. Content on this site is for general information only and is subject to change without notice. We strive for accuracy but cannot guarantee that all information is perfectly up to date at all times.
